description: OTP-only authentication flow via Resend. Users enter email, receive a branded 6-digit code, and verify to create a session. Middleware protects all app routes by redirecting unauthenticated users to login.

subDeliverables.title: OTP send endpoint
subDeliverables.description: API route that generates a 6-digit code, stores it in the otp_codes table with expiration, and sends it to the user's email via Resend.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/send-otp accepts email and generates 6-digit code
Code stored in otp_codes table with expires_at timestamp
Email sent via Resend with branded template

subDeliverables.title: OTP verify endpoint
subDeliverables.description: API route that validates the submitted code against the database, creates or finds the user, and returns an authenticated session token.
acceptanceCriteria: Expired or used codes are rejected
New users created automatically on first login
Session token returned on successful verification

subDeliverables.title: Login page
subDeliverables.description: Two-step login flow: step 1 collects email, step 2 collects OTP code. Auto-redirects to home if session already exists.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 shows email input with submit button
Step 2 shows OTP code input after email submitted
Existing sessions auto-redirect to home page
Error states displayed for invalid codes

subDeliverables.title: Middleware route protection
subDeliverables.description: Next.js middleware that checks for valid Supabase session on every request and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated requests to /app routes redirect to /login
Auth routes (/login, /api/auth/*) are accessible without session
Session refreshed on every request via cookies

subDeliverables.title: OTP email branding config
subDeliverables.description: Configuration for branded OTP emails: sender address, subject line, primary/accent colors matching the app design system.
acceptanceCriteria: Email template uses primary blue and accent amber colors
